results.name: Big Five
results.description: Scientists have discovered that identifying five key parameters can unlock a wealth of insight into a person's character! It's like having a cheat sheet for human behavior. So toss out those awkward first dates and forget about trying to read your partner's mind - this test has got you covered.
results.subDescription: Test based on the Five Factor Personality Model
results.shortDescription:
Evaluate the significance of the main
personality traits

results.name: Personality Type
results.description:
Uncover your psycho-type and explore the reasons
behind your actions and choices
results.subDescription: Test based on the C.Jung personality types
results.shortDescription:
Uncover your psycho-type and explore the reasons
behind your actions and choices

results.name: Attachment style
results.description: "Love" resonates alike, yet its interpretation varies. Some yearn for togetherness, while others relish moments of solitude.
results.subDescription: Test based on D. Bowlby's theory of attachment
results.shortDescription: Discover your desired level of care and attention from your partner, and also assess how much you're capable of giving in return.

results.name: Type of temperament
results.description:
What similarities exist among partners with diverse temperaments? 
Each individual is complex, displaying aspects of all temperaments. The test will reveal which one dominates your personality and whether you naturally connect with your mate.
results.subDescription: Test based on the Four temperament theory G. Eysenck, R. Cattell
results.shortDescription: Choleric, sanguine, melancholic and phlegmatic — how does your temperament affect relationships?
